primary_cohort.name: primary_native_outage_aware
primary_cohort.definition: At least one valid future target observation.

secondary_cohort.name: secondary_high_availability_95pct
secondary_cohort.definition: At least 95% valid input and at least 95% valid future targets.
secondary_cohort.role: Secondary headline cohort for high-availability comparability.

supplementary_cohort.name: supplementary_near_complete_99pct
supplementary_cohort.definition: At least 99% valid input and at least 99% valid future targets.

strict_complete_cohort.name: audit_strict_complete_100pct
strict_complete_cohort.definition: 100% valid input and 100% valid future targets.
strict_complete_cohort.role: Audit only; not a headline result because it is expected to be very small.

uncertainty_interval_policy: Do not treat overlapping sliding windows as independent samples. Later confidence intervals and significance analyses must use chronological block bootstrap or day-level grouped resampling.
